description: Git investigation ops — answer debugging questions in one call

git-status.description: Git dashboard: branch, ahead/behind, last 5 commits, staged/unstaged/untracked, stashes.

git-investigate.description: File investigation: recent commits, uncommitted changes, blame hotspots — everything about a file's recent history.

git-trail.description: Trace a symbol through history: when added, modified, removed. Chronological story via pickaxe search.

git-blame.description: Git blame: N lines around a specific line number with author, date, and commit info.
